zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wentworth於大約1395年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir John Wentworth52歲，母親Agnes Dronsfield43歲。他於大約1420年與Joan de Beaumont在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1461年6月11日在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wentworth于大约1395年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir John Wentworth52岁，母亲Agnes Dronsfield43岁。他于大约1420年与Joan de Beaumont在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1461年6月11日在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wentworth was born about 1395, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Wentworth, was 52 and his mother, Agnes Dronsfield, was 43. He married Joan de Beaumont about 1420, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 11 June 1461, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wentworth est né environ 1395, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wentworth, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Agnes Dronsfield, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Beaumont environ 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1461, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wentworth um 1395 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wentworth 52 und seine Mutter Agnes Dronsfield 43. Er hat um 1420 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 11. Juni 1461 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wentworth è nato il circa 1395 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Wentworth, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Dronsfield, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Beaumont circa 1420, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 11 giugno 1461, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wentworthが約1395年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Wentworthは52歳，母Agnes Dronsfieldは43歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1461年6月11日に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wentworth(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wentworth(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Dronsfield(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Joan de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1461년 6월 11일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wentworth nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Wentworth, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Dronsfield, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Beaumont aproximadamente 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1461, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wentworth родился около 1395 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wentworth было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Dronsfield, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Beaumont около 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 11 июня 1461 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

Se casó con Joan de Beaumont aproximadamente 1420, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 11 de junio de 1461, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
